race.comment: UNWANTED NEWS (8) improved nicely second-up to miss in a photo finish at Bunbury, running a new peak figure there. Now third-up into the campaign, she looks ready to fire with the aid of an inside barrier. Can raise the bar again now and she can land the knockout blow. NONEOFYOURBUSINESS (7) disappointed over 1300m fresh and dropped right back in trip last start when flying late at Belmont. Up to 1200m now is a good move and she looks to be nearing her best form. Can improve again now third-up. WIN FOR BUSTER (1) disappointed last start when fresh on a Heavy deck, though this presents as an opportunity for improvement. He jumped favourite there and the form has already held up. Expecting a better performance this time. SOVEREIGN CRUST (12) can improve out in distance today. SHE'S SOME CRAIC (6) was solid on resumption and is not to be discounted.
